title: picris hieracioides var. crepoides
intro: Picris hieracioides var. crepoides, also known as Creeping Hawk's Beard, is a variety of the Picris hieracioides plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions due to its bitter and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Creeping Hawk's Beard include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be dried and used in tinctures or capsules.
